headline: Why Does Affirm (AFRM) Appear so Attractive
summary: Affirm Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:AFRM) is one of the 10 best financial stocks with highest upside potential. On February 17, Affirm Holdings Inc. headline: Truist Reaffirms Buy Rating for Nvidia (NVDA)
summary: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of the 15 AI stocks that are quietly making investors rich. On March 10, Truist maintained its Buy rating on NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) ahead of the company’s annual GPU Technology Conference next week.
